summary: 28BYJ-48 four-phase stepper motor driven via ULN2003 driver board. Supports full-step and half-step modes with configurable speed and direction.
notes: 28BYJ-48 needs 5V supply; do NOT power from 3.3V MCU rail.
ULN2003 driver board has built-in flyback diodes.
Full-step sequence: 4096 steps per revolution (with 1:64 gear ratio).
Minimum step delay ~2ms for reliable operation.

app_logic_snippets.loop:
Stepper_SetSpeed(10);  /* RPM */
Stepper_Step(2048, STEPPER_CW);  /* half revolution */
app_logic_snippets.notes: Direction: STEPPER_CW / STEPPER_CCW. 2048 steps = 180 degrees. Call Stepper_Stop() to de-energize coils and save power.
